productDisplayName: Disney Kids Boy's Double Fun Kidswear
description: Composition:100% cotton white t-shirt with black long sleeves and round neck, and dark blue denims with Pooh and Tigger printsWashcare:Machine wash in cold water with a gentle cycle using mild detergent. Wash dark colours seperately. Do not bleach. Do not soak nor wring. Dry it inside out. Do not tumble dry. Do not iron on print and studs.Fitting:Comfort FitYour little boy is all set to double the fun this summer in this cotton white tee with slanted, long, black sleeves and a pair of denims from disney. Tigger and Pooh will join him in the fun when he gangs up with his friends for s fun-filled summer evening.
